name: Zonta waffles
description: Annually the Zonta club of Sainte-Croix organizes a waffle sale. It is on the occasion of a course on developing a webapp using Laravel that with three classmates we are going to offer them a management tool. This application allows to organize sales, place orders, assign deliveries and manage invoicing.

name: SeaCracker
description: During a course on object-oriented programming, with three classmates we developed a "Kahoot like" quiz application. The questions are asked from a presenter device and participants can answer them from their smartphone. The application is based on Angular and uses WebSockets for real-time communication.

name: Medical appointment
description: During an internship in a company I was tasked with developing a medical appointment scheduling application. The backend already existed in the form of an API. I worked entirely on the frontend in close collaboration with the designers and backend developers.
